name: com.servicialo/mcp-server
title: Servicialo MCP Server
description: Open protocol for booking and scheduling professional services via AI agents

SERVICIALO_API_KEY.description: API key for authenticated tools (booking, lifecycle, payments). Optional — 10 public discovery tools work without it.

SERVICIALO_ORG_ID.description: Organization slug for authenticated mode. Optional — omit for discovery-only mode.
